query_title: The Diving Bell and the Butterfly

recommendations.title: At Eternity's Gate
recommendations.overview: Famed but tormented artist Vincent van Gogh spends his final years in Arles, France, painting masterworks of the natural world that surrounds him.

recommendations.title: Basquiat
recommendations.overview: The brief life of Jean Michel Basquiat, a world renowned New York street artist struggling with fame, drugs and his identity.

recommendations.title: Before Night Falls
recommendations.overview: Spanning several decades, this powerful biopic offers a glimpse into the life of famed Cuban poet and novelist Reinaldo Arenas, an artist who was vilified for his homosexuality in Fidel Castro's Cuba.

recommendations.title: The Devil Wears Prada
recommendations.overview: A young woman from the Midwest gets more than she bargained for when she moves to New York to become a writer and ends up as the assistant to the tyrannical, larger-than-life editor-in-chief of a major fashion magazine.

recommendations.title: Lee
recommendations.overview: The true story of photographer Elizabeth "Lee" Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.

recommendations.title: Detroit
recommendations.overview: A police raid in Detroit in 1967 results in one of the largest citizens' uprisings in the history of the United States.

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth 3
recommendations.overview: It’s the summer before Elle heads to college, and she has a secret decision to make. Elle has been accepted into Harvard, where boyfriend Noah is matriculating, and also Berkeley, where her BFF Lee is headed and has to decide if she should stay or no

recommendations.title: Front of the Class
recommendations.overview: A boy with Tourette's syndrome overcomes criticism and discrimination to achieve his dream of becoming a teacher.

recommendations.title: Cyrano de Bergerac
recommendations.overview: Famed swordsman and poet Cyrano de Bergerac is in love with his cousin Roxane. He has never expressed his love for her as he his large nose undermines his self-confidence. Then he finds a way to express his love to her, indirectly.

recommendations.title: Mr. Know-It-All
recommendations.overview: A football coach afraid of commitment has to take care of his nephew with Asperger's Syndrome.
